description: Template rendering, regex, and JSONPath transforms.

tools.description: Render a Jinja2 template using a set of variables. Use to build prompts, message bodies, or request payloads from flow data.

schema.name: template
schema.description: The Jinja2 template text, e.g. 'Hi {{ name }}, you have {{ count }} items.'

schema.name: variables
schema.description: Variables to render with, as a JSON object.

_confDescriptions.autoescape: Jinja2 autoescape toggle. true escapes HTML-sensitive chars in output; false (default) leaves them as-is.
_confDescriptions.strict: If true, undefined template variables raise an error. If false (default), they render as empty strings.

tools.description: Extract all matches of a regex from text, or replace matches with a substitution. Use for pulling structured fragments (emails, ids, codes) out of free text or cleaning text.

schema.name: mode
schema.description: Regex operation: 'match' (anchored at start), 'search' (first match anywhere), 'findall' (all matches, default), 'sub' (replace), 'split' (split on pattern). Legacy aliases 'extract'->'findall' and 'replace'->'sub' still work.

schema.name: replacement
schema.description: Replacement string when mode is 'sub'. Supports backrefs like \1.

_confDescriptions.multiline: Multiline mode (re.MULTILINE): ^ and $ match at line boundaries. Default false.
_confDescriptions.max_matches: Cap on number of matches returned by findall/split to prevent runaway output. Default 500.

tools.description: Pull values out of JSON with a JSONPath expression, or reshape JSON into a new object using a field->path mapping. Use to extract the relevant fields from an API response.

schema.name: data
schema.description: The JSON to read from (object/array or JSON string).

schema.name: path
schema.description: A single JSONPath expression, e.g. '$.items[*].id'. Use this OR mapping.

schema.name: mapping
schema.description: A JSON object of {output_field: jsonpath} to build a new shape. Use this OR path.

_confDescriptions.max_input_bytes: Cap on input JSON size in bytes; oversized input is rejected. Default 1048576 (1 MiB).
_confDescriptions.max_results: Cap on number of JSONPath matches returned to prevent runaway output. Default 1000.
